 Options View Legend Legend
Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Tab We're On

1410m
Class: 3-Y-O, BM70, Handicap
Resulted
Tips & Race Analysis

Analysis

This race could be run at a muddling tempo. EXIT bolted in last start to break maiden at Sandown Hillside on a soft track when fresh and must be respected from this yard, will take the power of beating. OUR CHIEF has had a flying start to their career and last start winner to break maiden at Geelong on a soft track, include in exotics. CROSSBOW just missed as favourite last start at Randwick and has placed in two attempts in tow venues this campaign at metro level, outside hope. HILLIER coming off a win to break maiden at Newcastle when first up and racing back at metro class on a Saturday, for the wider exotics.

Selections

  • 4. Exit (1) $2.15
  • 3. Our Chief (3) $4.60
  • 2. Crossbow (5) $3.60
  • 1. Hillier (4) $9.80
